title: cousinia sonchifolia
intro: Cousinia sonchifolia, also known as Bhangira or Bhanga, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence. The health benefits of Cousinia sonchifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Cousinia sonchifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to make medicines like powders, capsules, and ointments.
